query:
SELECT a.id AS a, b.id AS b
               FROM books a JOIN books b ON a.id < b.id AND a.file_hash = b.file_hash
               WHERE a.id = ANY($1) AND b.id = ANY($1) AND a.file_hash != ''
                 AND ($2::uuid[] IS NULL OR a.id = ANY($2) OR b.id = ANY($2))
               LIMIT $3
